name: Bali Myna
threats: Illegal trapping for cage bird trade
conservationEfforts: West Bali National Park breeding facility. Community-based release programs. Temple release programs have boosted wild numbers. Friend of the National Parks Foundation releases captive-bred birds.
description: One of the rarest birds in the world, with brilliant white plumage and a bright blue eye patch. Endemic to Bali, Indonesia, it was nearly driven extinct by the cage bird trade.
